languages.text: "Неожиданный выбор способа скоротать время, друг мой, но почему бы и нет? Я давно не проповедовал неискушенным". {n}Эоганн с важным видом складывает руки на животе.{/n} "Внемлите мне, верноподданные Империума!" {n}Гулкий глас манипулуса, усиленный вокс-кодером, мгновенно обращает на себя внимание толпы.{/n}

"An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Неожиданный выбор способа скоротать время, друг мой, но почему бы и нет? Я давно не проповедовал неискушенным". {n}Эоганн с важным видом складывает руки на животе.{/n} "Внемлите мне, верноподданные Империума!" {n}Гулкий глас манипулуса, усиленный вокс-кодером, мгновенно обращает на себя внимание толпы.{/n}

It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

languages.text: «Es una forma extraña de pasar el rato, pero ¿por qué no? Hace tiempo que no predico para los no iniciados». {n}Eogunn coloca sus manos sobre su estómago solemnemente.{/n} «¡Escuchen, fieles súbditos del Imperium!». {n}La estentórea voz del manipulus, amplificada por el voco, llama la atención del gentío de inmediato.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Es una forma extraña de pasar el rato, pero ¿por qué no? Hace tiempo que no predico para los no iniciados». {n}Eogunn coloca sus manos sobre su estómago solemnemente.{/n} «¡Escuchen, fieles súbditos del Imperium!». {n}La estentórea voz del manipulus, amplificada por el voco, llama la atención del gentío de inmediato.{/n}

languages.text: “真是个意想不到的消遣方式，朋友。不过有何不可呢？我已许久没有向未受启蒙者布道了。”{n}伊奥贡庄严地将双手交叠在肚子上。{/n}“听我说，帝国忠诚的子民们！”{n}操纵者那经由音阵编码器放大的洪亮嗓音，立刻吸引了人群的注意力。{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “真是个意想不到的消遣方式，朋友。不过有何不可呢？我已许久没有向未受启蒙者布道了。”{n}伊奥贡庄严地将双手交叠在肚子上。{/n}“听我说，帝国忠诚的子民们！”{n}操纵者那经由音阵编码器放大的洪亮嗓音，立刻吸引了人群的注意力。{/n}

languages.text: "Ein durchaus unerwarteter Zeitvertreib, aber warum nicht? Ich habe lange nicht mehr vor den Uneingeweihten gepredigt." {n}Eogunn faltet feierlich die Hände über seinem Bauch.{/n} "Hört mich an, treue Untertanen des Imperiums!" {n}Die dröhnende, von einem Vox-Coder verstärkte Stimme des Manipulus zieht sofort die Aufmerksamkeit aller Anwesenden auf sich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ein durchaus unerwarteter Zeitvertreib, aber warum nicht? Ich habe lange nicht mehr vor den Uneingeweihten gepredigt." {n}Eogunn faltet feierlich die Hände über seinem Bauch.{/n} "Hört mich an, treue Untertanen des Imperiums!" {n}Die dröhnende, von einem Vox-Coder verstärkte Stimme des Manipulus zieht sofort die Aufmerksamkeit aller Anwesenden auf sich.{/n}

languages.text: « Ma foi, c'est une curieuse façon de tuer le temps, mon {mf|ami|amie}, mais pourquoi pas ? Voilà bien longtemps que je n'ai pas prêché la bonne parole auprès des non-initiés. » {n}Eogunn croise les mains sur son estomac avec le plus grand sérieux.{/n} « Oyez, loyaux sujets de l'Imperium ! » {n}La voix tonitruante du manipulus, amplifiée par un codeur-vox, attire immédiatement l'attention de la foule.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ma foi, c'est une curieuse façon de tuer le temps, mon {mf|ami|amie}, mais pourquoi pas ? Voilà bien longtemps que je n'ai pas prêché la bonne parole auprès des non-initiés. » {n}Eogunn croise les mains sur son estomac avec le plus grand sérieux.{/n} « Oyez, loyaux sujets de l'Imperium ! » {n}La voix tonitruante du manipulus, amplifiée par un codeur-vox, attire immédiatement l'attention de la foule.{/n}

languages.text: "Vakit geçirmek için beklenmedik bir yöntem fakat neden olmasın? Konuya yabancı olanlara vaaz vermeyeli epey zaman oldu." {n}Eogunn, ellerini ciddiyetle karnının üzerinde birleştiriyor.{/n} "Beni dinleyin ey İmparatorluk'un sadık tebaası!" {n}Manipülus'un voks koduyla güçlendirilmiş gürleyen sesi, anında kalabalığın dikkatini çekiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Vakit geçirmek için beklenmedik bir yöntem fakat neden olmasın? Konuya yabancı olanlara vaaz vermeyeli epey zaman oldu." {n}Eogunn, ellerini ciddiyetle karnının üzerinde birleştiriyor.{/n} "Beni dinleyin ey İmparatorluk'un sadık tebaası!" {n}Manipülus'un voks koduyla güçlendirilmiş gürleyen sesi, anında kalabalığın dikkatini çekiyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「予想外の暇つぶしだが、どうだろう？未開の地で説教したのは随分と昔のことだ。」{n}エオガンは腹に手を当てて真摯な顔で言った。{/n}「帝国の忠実な臣民よ、私の言葉を聞け！」{n}マニピュラスの雄々しい声がヴォックス・コーダーで増幅され、瞬く間に群衆の注意を引きつけた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "An unexpected means of passing the time, my friend, but why not? It has been a long while since I last preached to the uninitiated." {n}Eogunn solemnly folds his hands over his stomach.{/n} "Hear me, loyal subjects of the Imperium!" {n}The Manipulus's booming voice, amplified by a vox-coder, instantly commands the crowd's attention.{/n}
